creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Wed Jan 23 02:48:34 2013
New Revision: 310850
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310850

Log:
  Add rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver 0.2.1, eventMachine HTTP Server.
  
  PR:		ports/172118
  Submitted by:	Kimo <kimor79@yahoo.com>

Added:
  head/www/rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver/
  head/www/rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/Makefile

Modified: head/www/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/Makefile	Wed Jan 23 02:43:16 2013	(r310849)
+++ head/www/Makefile	Wed Jan 23 02:48:34 2013	(r310850)
@@ -1707,6 +1707,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-em-websocket
     SUBDIR += rubygem-emk-sinatra-url-for
     SUBDIR += rubygem-erubis
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver
     SUBDIR += rubygem-faraday
     SUBDIR += rubygem-faraday_middleware
     SUBDIR += rubygem-feed-normalizer

Added: head/www/rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver/Makefile	Wed Jan 23 02:48:34 2013	(r310850)
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+# Created by: Kimo <kimor79@yahoo.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	eventmachine_httpserver
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.1
+CATEGORIES=	www rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
+COMMENT=	EventMachine HTTP Server
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/www/rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver/distinfo	Wed Jan 23 02:48:34 2013	(r310850)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (rubygem/eventmachine_httpserver-0.2.1.gem) = 5db5e8a23754204d43592e5fcc2160457c57c870babe6307c4e61fc95019b809
+SIZE (rubygem/eventmachine_httpserver-0.2.1.gem) = 25088

Added: head/www/rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/rubygem-eventmachine_httpserver/pkg-descr	Wed Jan 23 02:48:34 2013	(r310850)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+An evented http server built on top of eventmachine
+
+WWW: https://github.com/eventmachine/evma_httpserver
